name: anchor-compliance
description: Scan websites and ad copy for Australian advertising compliance issues (ACCC, TGA, ASIC, AHPRA, ACMA). Returns risk scores, flagged phrases, and jurisdiction-specific guidelines on demand.

tools.name: scan_website_compliance
tools.description: Scans a public URL for advertising and marketing compliance issues across Australian regulatory frameworks. Returns indicative risk score, top issues, and a link to a full report.

tools.name: check_ad_copy
tools.description: Analyses ad, social, or email copy for regulatory risk under Australian advertising law. Returns risk level, flagged phrases, and indicative suggested edits.

tools.name: get_compliance_guidelines
tools.description: Returns a summary of advertising and marketing compliance guidelines for a given industry and jurisdiction (e.g. healthcare in AU, gambling in NSW).
